news.title: Trump says 'I'll remember' companies that don’t seek tariff refunds
news.summary: The U.S. Supreme Court ruled IEEPA tariffs were illegal. Trump said he was "not happy with the Supreme Court" for ruling the tariffs illegal. He said the court should have kept the tariffs already collected.

news.title: Trump tells CNBC he expects U.S. to make ‘great deal’ with Iran
news.summary: President Donald Trump has repeatedly said he expects the U.S. and Israel war against Iran to end soon since it began in late February.

news.title: UPS and FedEx have begun filing for some tariff refunds
news.summary: UPS and FedEx have begun filing requests for some tariff refunds through the government's refund process. Those funds could take months to reach customers.

news.title: Trump surprised by stock market comeback amid Iran conflict, thought Dow would be down 20%
news.summary: President Donald Trump says he is surprised by the resiliency of the stock market amid the Iran conflict. Trump: I'm surprised by how well the market is doing.

news.title: Trump says Anthropic is shaping up and a deal is 'possible' for Department of Defense use
news.summary: President Trump said his administration had "some very good talks" with Anthropic during a meeting at the White House last week. Trump said the talks were "very good"

news.title: McDonald’s $3 menu kicks off today. Here’s why Wall Street is already a fan.
news.summary: UBS analysts say the new more affordable menu options further support McDonald’s value strength. UBS analysts: The new menu options will support McDonald's value strength in the long term.

news.title: GE sees fuel prices higher than they are now through the summer due to the Iran conflict
news.summary: GE Aerospace’s stock falls as the full-year outlook was kept mostly intact despite a big first-quarter earnings beat. GE Aerospace‘s stock fell as theFull-year Outlook was kept largely intact despite the big First-quarter Earnings Beat.

news.title: These alternative index strategies are beating the S&P 500 after the stock market’s new highs
news.summary: Invesco has nine factor approaches to tracking the S&P 500. All but one have beaten the index this year. Two have stood out since the stock market’s March 30 low.

news.title: Did JetBlue just admit to surveillance pricing? Airline now says viral post about $230 fare hike was an error.
news.summary: JetBlue is now walking back advice given to a customer via social media to search for fares in incognito mode. JetBlue: We are sorry for any confusion this has caused.

news.title: ChatGPT is so 2025 — these 3 sectors are the real AI gold mines for 2026
news.summary: Defense, healthcare and agentics are the big winners, writes Mark Minevich. Money is flooding into AI, writes Minevich, and it's set to get even better.
